feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Could not join any group
entry.content:
Hi Team, I am a new joiner and would like to join the starter SAP community but could not. Could someone help to resolve it? 

Many thanks.

entry.title: ME3L % Consumed Calculation
entry.content: How is the % consumed displayed in ME3L calculated, and in what tables are the numbers used in the calculation stored?

entry.title: PGI and PGR Automation for the completed Sales orders & Delivery orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I’m working on a business scenario and would appreciate any insights or experiences from the community. Here’s the process flow we are trying to achieve with complete automation. This scenario applies only to virtual orders; the same order types are used for virtual and nonvirtual processes.

  1. Return Sales Order Creation:

   - Create a return delivery order and assign the serial number (which is picked from a customized field in the sales order).

   - Post Goods Receipt (PGR) after assigning the serial number.

  1. Stock Allocation:

   - Upon PGR (From step 1), allocate the returned stock to the virtual sales order automatically.

  1. Order Completion and Delivery:

   - Virtual sales order is complete, and a delivery order will automatically be created.

   - Assign the serial number again and post goods issue (PGI) automatically.

Has anyone encountered a similar scenario? If so, how did you implement it? Looking forward to any suggestions or solutions.

entry.title: Posting Folders From Open Connectors to AWS S3 Bucket
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, How I Post Folders to AWS S3 Bucket using Open Connectors. Authentication is done and also I have a instance but I do not understand how I Execute to send Folder. Please suggest.

entry.title: SAP ECC 6 EHP 7 FInance Closing period Restriction setup and configuration
entry.content: During Month End Closing, need to allow Finance Users to make adjustments that impact FI records, but restrict the rest of the users to update anything that impact the FI records. How can I do it ?

entry.title: Output Management for S4HANA missing determination in application log
entry.content:
Hello experts, i'm relatively new to Output Management in S4, I have been using previously NACE. I'm trying to get the determination log in SLG1 as explained here : https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/output-management-s4hana-trace-maxime-d%C3%A9r%C3%A9/

 

It partially works but i'm not getting any of the informational logs, only warnings 😞

This is what I get : 

But none of the determination log such as this 

Thanks in advance for any help!

entry.title: SAP Community,
entry.content: Hello SAP Community,I am currently creating a new time transfer and time types to capture the beginning and end balances for the grouping

entry.title: issue connect SAP Crystal reports to INFOR CSD
entry.content:
getting this error when trying to use the Infor JDBC driver.
SAP Crystal Reports Logon Failed. Details: SQL exception: [SQL State:] null [Error Message:] Data Lake is not available

I have tested the driver thru DBeaver and successfully connect to the database.

entry.title: "Field RALT_DYNP_STRUC-ANBTR01(4) is not an input field "While uploading current year assetsin LSMW
entry.content: getting error in LSMW, While updating the ordinary depreciation posted field for current year assets,its not auto updating from file. Since i have updated in file

entry.title: How to send SAP SLT LTRC statistics tab data to Grafana
entry.content:
Hi,

I am just interested to find a way to fetch all the initial load statistics that I am able to see in LTRC by using a SQ: query incase if all the values are getting stored in a table or is there a way to get those values by using a script. My end goal is to show all the initial load and delta load statistics in Grafana. I need a single picture of what is happening for my tables inside my each MTID on Grafana. I don't want to click on each table and see the statistics. Can you please guide on doing this. I am quite new to SAP SLT. I didn't find any online resources. 

 

I am talking about this data. I only pasted the initial load statistics but generally I am interested in fetching both initial load and delta load statistics to Grafana. 

 

 

Thanks,

Sai.

entry.title: stuck at WS99900237 is not a valid object
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am new to SAP, mostly working in OpenText. I am working on SAP archiving. I try to explore workflow types configuration tcode SOA0

but i am stuck at the screen keep mention WS99900237 is not a valid object. i need to see the entire list of doc types in this list and add new document types.

how to move and see the entire list?

thanks.

entry.title: Increase performance for nested loop WITHOUT any key fields
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have some validations to add to a particular internal table - 

First itab1 contains FI document number

Second itab2 contains fixed posting periods from 000 to 012.

I need all 12 posting periods for all FI document number - so by default i am keeping loop inside loop without any key field.because for some documnet number i have only 1 or 2 posting periods and i need to add rest of 10 posting periods to itab1.

this is taking a lot of time for execution since there are many FI document numbers and i need to run 12 times for each document number.

Is there any way to improve the performance for above case since there is no key field to keep condition.

loop itab1.

loop itab2.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SMQ2 - Display LUW doesn't open the Display Logs
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a question for the community, maybe you can help us. We are trying to display the logs for the SYSFAIL entries in the SMQ2 transaction of our quality system, but it's not working. It works perfectly in the development system and also in the productive system, but not in quality.

Do you know if there is any SAP Note or Blog entry that could help us? We are looking for answers in the SAP Blogs and KBAs, but until now we have not found any useful input 😞

Thanks!

 

KR Isa

entry.title: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

When working with SAP HANA Calculation Views perfromance optimization, how do you figure out where the performance is slow or what is causing it? 

I am currently learning on this concept but always my question is, how do we actually know where the performance is poor? On what basis can we say that the performance of a calculation view is bad?

Thanks in advance for your suggestions!

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud SAP HANA, express edition 

Best Regards,

Vikram Kamvar

entry.title: Patch operation in SAP Netweaver SCIM
entry.content:
Hello,

Hello,
we have on-premise SAP NetWeaver instance with SCIM provisioning enabled as it's described here- SCIM Vanilla Application for AS Java | SAP Help Portal It's working correctly and we are able to create and update users and groups via GET and PUT API methods. Unfortunately with SCIM interface PUT operations means 'overwrite' and I need to have a method to update only user password without editing other fields. Based on that I thought that using PATCH operation with below body would be a good option:

 

{
"schemas": [
"urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp"
],
"Operations": [
{
"op": "replace",
"path": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User:password",
"value": "NewPassword123!"
}
]
}

Unfortunately once trying to use it I get 'Internal Server Error.'. I think it's because currently in /scim/v2/ServiceProviderConfig endpoint I get reply that Patch is not supported. 

Does anyone know if it is possible to enable PATCH for NetWeaver? If so then where I can do it.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: PR Layout setting during ME51N
entry.content:
Users have been changing the standard layout defined by SAP when creating PR, This is impacting functionality and causing confusion with Requisitioners. How do I restrict this in a way that users can only create their user specific layout and not making any layout from the global default setting. 

#sap #ERP

entry.title: How can I make catalog and tile names multi-language in SAP FIORI?
entry.content:
The purpose of this article is to explain how to implement multi-language support for the title information of a tile created in SAP Fiori. The goal is to ensure that when the user selects English, the tile's title is displayed in English, and similarly, when the user selects Turkish, the tile's title is displayed in Turkish. This allows for a seamless language experience in Fiori applications, providing localized content based on the user's language preference.

Step 1

The first step is to locate the DESCRIPTION ID on the catalog page (highlighted with a yellow marker).

Step 2

In the SAP screen, navigate to the following screen using the SE63 transaction code (pay attention to the Client). The screen that appears is as shown below. The “Short Texts” button should be clicked to open the “Object Type Selection” screen, and from the “Meta Objects”, double-click on the “TABL Tables (Meta)” option.

Step 3

The screen that will appear is as shown below. The “Object Name” field should be filled with the code "WDY_CONF_USERT2". In the “Source Language” field (the language you want to translate from), enter "English", and in the “Target Language” field (the language you want to translate to), enter "Turkish". You can proceed to the next step by clicking the “Edit” button.

 

Step 4

In the window that opens, enter the “Configuration ID” to find the appropriate “Description ID” (as shown in Step 1). After locating the relevant ID, double-click on the selected ID.

Step 5

In the window that opens, click on the **Execute** button.

Step 6

In the screen that opens, enter the catalog names in the desired language in the rows indicated by the “Green Line”. Then, save the changes by clicking the “Save” button.

Step 7

You should navigate to the SE38 screen and clear the cache. The steps are as follows:

Fill the Program field with the code "/UI2/INVALIDATE_CLIENT_CACHES" and execute it using the green button.

The Program field should be filled with the code "/UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES" and executed using the green button.

Step 8

The processes have been completed. You can go to the screen where you want to perform the operation and test it.

entry.title: How can I make catalog and tile names multi-language in SAP FIORI?
entry.content:
How can I make catalog and tile names multi-language in SAP FIORI?

 

The purpose of this article is to explain how to implement multi-language support for the title information of a tile created in SAP Fiori. The goal is to ensure that when the user selects English, the tile's title is displayed in English, and similarly, when the user selects Turkish, the tile's title is displayed in Turkish. This allows for a seamless language experience in Fiori applications, providing localized content based on the user's language preference.

Step 1

The first step is to locate the DESCRIPTION ID on the catalog page (highlighted with a yellow marker).

Step 2

In the SAP screen, navigate to the following screen using the SE63 transaction code (pay attention to the Client). The screen that appears is as shown below. The “Short Texts” button should be clicked to open the “Object Type Selection” screen, and from the “Meta Objects”, double-click on the “TABL Tables (Meta)” option.

Step 3

The screen that will appear is as shown below. The “Object Name” field should be filled with the code "WDY_CONF_USERT2". In the “Source Language” field (the language you want to translate from), enter "English", and in the “Target Language” field (the language you want to translate to), enter "Turkish". You can proceed to the next step by clicking the “Edit” button.

 

Step 4

In the window that opens, enter the “Configuration ID” to find the appropriate “Description ID” (as shown in Step 1). After locating the relevant ID, double-click on the selected ID.

 

 

Step 5

In the window that opens, click on the **Execute** button.

Step 6

In the screen that opens, enter the catalog names in the desired language in the rows indicated by the “Green Line”. Then, save the changes by clicking the “Save” button.

Step 7

You should navigate to the SE38 screen and clear the cache. The steps are as follows:

Fill the Program field with the code "/UI2/INVALIDATE_CLIENT_CACHES" and execute it using the green button.

The Program field should be filled with the code "/UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES" and executed using the green button.

 

Step 8

The processes have been completed. You can go to the screen where you want to perform the operation and test it.

entry.title: Gropup reporting on premise 2023/SP1 - enable the hierarchy for WBS elements
entry.content:
Hi,

With the code transnactionFINCS_ADDLFLD_SEL_U, you can manage the hierarchy in group reporting modul

You can activate the hierarchy for cost center, profit center, business area, functional aera,etc..

But you can't active the hierarchy for wbs elements , see the copy

Do you know the reason ?

Thanks

Bastien

entry.title: SAP Community notification issue
entry.content: Since first of September, I do not received any email notifications from SAP Community. It looks like I have lost all the SAP managed tags I subscribed to. Is it a known issue ?
